question: Write a workout tracking app that can import from several fitness apps including Strava, Polar Flow, MyFitnessPal to put together a dashboard of workouts and nutrition information. The user should be able to customise the views by sport as well as by overall mileage or other stats that transfer across sports such as heart rate or total time. Heart rate data should be aggregated to display the total amount of time at different intensity zones. The user should be able to see a graph of their overall progress by pace or by mileage using a dropdown to switch between them.

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from strava import Client
from polar import FlowClient
from myfitnesspal import Client as MFPClient
import pandas as pd

class WorkoutTracker:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("Workout Tracker")
        self.sport = tk.StringVar()
        self.view = tk.StringVar()
        self.data = {}

        self.strava_client = Client(client_id='your_strava_client_id', client_secret='your_strava_client_secret')
        self.polar_client = FlowClient(client_id='your_polar_client_id', client_secret='your_polar_client_secret')
        self.mfp_client = MFPClient(username='your_mfp_username', password='your_mfp_password')

        self.sport.set("All")
        self.view.set("Mileage")

        self.sport_label = tk.Label(root, text="Select Sport:")
        self.sport_label.pack()
        self.sport_option = tk.OptionMenu(root, self.sport, "All", "Running", "Cycling", "Swimming")
        self.sport_option.pack()

        self.view_label = tk.Label(root, text="Select View:")
        self.view_label.pack()
        self.view_option = tk.OptionMenu(root, self.view, "Mileage", "Pace", "Heart Rate")
        self.view_option.pack()

        self.graph_button = tk.Button(root, text="Show Graph", command=self.show_graph)
        self.graph_button.pack()

        self.import_button = tk.Button(root, text="Import Data", command=self.import_data)
        self.import_button.pack()

        self.dashboard_label = tk.Label(root, text="Dashboard:")
        self.dashboard_label.pack()
        self.dashboard_text = tk.Text(root)
        self.dashboard_text.pack()

    def import_data(self):
        self.data = {}
        strava_data = self.strava_client.get_activities()
        polar_data = self.polar_client.get_workouts()
        mfp_data = self.mfp_client.get_diary_entries()

        for activity in strava_data:
            self.data[activity['id']] = {
                'sport': activity['type'],
                'distance': activity['distance'],
                'pace': activity['average_speed'],
                'heart_rate': activity['average_heartrate'],
                'time': activity['moving_time']
            }

        for workout in polar_data:
            self.data[workout['id']] = {
                'sport': workout['type'],
                'distance': workout['distance'],
                'pace': workout['average_speed'],
                'heart_rate': workout['average_heart_rate'],
                'time': workout['duration']
            }

        for entry in mfp_data:
            self.data[entry['id']] = {
                'sport': 'Nutrition',
                'calories': entry['calories'],
                'protein': entry['protein'],
                'carbs': entry['carbs'],
                'fat': entry['fat']
            }

        self.update_dashboard()

    def update_dashboard(self):
        self.dashboard_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
        if self.sport.get() == "All":
            sport_data = self.data
        else:
            sport_data = {key: value for key, value in self.data.items() if value['sport'] == self.sport.get()}

        if self.view.get() == "Mileage":
            total_mileage = sum(value['distance'] for value in sport_data.values())
            self.dashboard_text.insert(tk.END, f"Total Mileage: {total_mileage}\n")
        elif self.view.get() == "Pace":
            total_time = sum(value['time'] for value in sport_data.values())
            total_distance = sum(value['distance'] for value in sport_data.values())
            average_pace = total_time / total_distance
            self.dashboard_text.insert(tk.END, f"Average Pace: {average_pace}\n")
        elif self.view.get() == "Heart Rate":
            heart_rate_data = [value['heart_rate'] for value in sport_data.values() if 'heart_rate' in value]
            heart_rate_zones = {}
            for heart_rate in heart_rate_data:
                if heart_rate < 120:
                    heart_rate_zones['Low'] = heart_rate_zones.get('Low', 0) + 1
                elif heart_rate < 140:
                    heart_rate_zones['Medium'] = heart_rate_zones.get('Medium', 0) + 1
                else:
                    heart_rate_zones['High'] = heart_rate_zones.get('High', 0) + 1
            self.dashboard_text.insert(tk.END, f"Heart Rate Zones: {heart_rate_zones}\n")

    def show_graph(self):
        if self.view.get() == "Mileage":
            mileage_data = [value['distance'] for value in self.data.values() if 'distance' in value]
            plt.plot(mileage_data)
            plt.xlabel("Workout")
            plt.ylabel("Mileage")
            plt.title("Mileage Over Time")
            plt.show()
        elif self.view.get() == "Pace":
            pace_data = [value['pace'] for value in self.data.values() if 'pace' in value]
            plt.plot(pace_data)
            plt.xlabel("Workout")
            plt.ylabel("Pace")
            plt.title("Pace Over Time")
            plt.show()

root = tk.Tk()
app = WorkoutTracker(root)
root.mainloop()

import dash
import dash_core_components as dcc
import dash_html_components as html
from dash.dependencies import Input, Output
import plotly.express as px
import pandas as pd
from stravalib import Client
from polarflow import PolarFlow
from myfitnesspal import MyFitnessPal

app = dash.Dash(__name__)

# Initialize clients for each fitness app
strava_client = Client()
polar_flow_client = PolarFlow()
myfitnesspal_client = MyFitnessPal()

# Define a function to fetch data from each app
def fetch_data(app_name):
    if app_name == 'strava':
        return strava_client.get_activities()
    elif app_name == 'polar_flow':
        return polar_flow_client.get_workouts()
    elif app_name == 'myfitnesspal':
        return myfitnesspal_client.get_diary()

# Define a function to aggregate heart rate data
def aggregate_heart_rate(data):
    heart_rate_zones = {
        'low': (0, 120),
        'moderate': (121, 140),
        'high': (141, 160),
        'very_high': (161, 180)
    }
    aggregated_data = {}
    for zone, (min_hr, max_hr) in heart_rate_zones.items():
        aggregated_data[zone] = sum(1 for hr in data['heart_rate'] if min_hr <= hr <= max_hr)
    return aggregated_data

# Define a function to create a dashboard
def create_dashboard(data):
    # Create a figure for overall progress
    fig = px.line(x=data['date'], y=data['mileage'])
    fig.update_layout(title='Overall Progress', xaxis_title='Date', yaxis_title='Mileage')

    # Create a dropdown to switch between pace and mileage
    dropdown = dcc.Dropdown(
        id='metric-dropdown',
        options=[
            {'label': 'Pace', 'value': 'pace'},
            {'label': 'Mileage', 'value': 'mileage'}
        ],
        value='mileage'
    )

    # Create a graph for heart rate zones
    heart_rate_data = aggregate_heart_rate(data)
    heart_rate_fig = px.bar(x=list(heart_rate_data.keys()), y=list(heart_rate_data.values()))
    heart_rate_fig.update_layout(title='Heart Rate Zones', xaxis_title='Zone', yaxis_title='Time')

    # Create a layout for the dashboard
    layout = html.Div([
        html.H1('Workout Tracking Dashboard'),
        dropdown,
        dcc.Graph(id='overall-progress', figure=fig),
        dcc.Graph(id='heart-rate-zones', figure=heart_rate_fig)
    ])

    return layout

# Define a callback to update the dashboard
@app.callback(
    Output('overall-progress', 'figure'),
    [Input('metric-dropdown', 'value')]
)
def update_dashboard(metric):
    data = fetch_data('strava')
    if metric == 'pace':
        fig = px.line(x=data['date'], y=data['pace'])
        fig.update_layout(title='Overall Progress', xaxis_title='Date', yaxis_title='Pace')
    else:
        fig = px.line(x=data['date'], y=data['mileage'])
        fig.update_layout(title='Overall Progress', xaxis_title='Date', yaxis_title='Mileage')
    return fig

# Run the app
if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run_server(debug=True)

from myfitnesspal import MyFitnessPal

app = dash.Dash(__name__)

# Initialize fitness app clients
strava_client = Client()
polar_client = Polar()
myfitnesspal_client = MyFitnessPal()

# Define layout
app.layout = html.Div([
    html.H1('Workout Tracking App'),
    html.P('Select fitness apps to import data from:'),
    dcc.Checklist(
        id='apps',
        options=[
            {'label': 'Strava', 'value': 'strava'},
            {'label': 'Polar Flow', 'value': 'polar'},
            {'label': 'MyFitnessPal', 'value': 'myfitnesspal'}
        ],
        value=['strava', 'polar', 'myfitnesspal']
    ),
    html.P('Select view:'),
    dcc.Dropdown(
        id='view',
        options=[
            {'label': 'Report', 'value': 'report'},
            {'label': 'Mileage', 'value': 'mileage'},
            {'label': 'Heart Rate', 'value': 'heart_rate'}
        ],
        value='report'
    ),
    dcc.Graph(id='graph'),
    html.P('Select graph type:'),
    dcc.Dropdown(
        id='graph-type',
        options=[
            {'label': 'Pace', 'value': 'pace'},
            {'label': 'Mileage', 'value': 'mileage'}
        ],
        value='pace'
    )
])

# Define callback to update graph
@app.callback(
    Output('graph', 'figure'),
    [Input('apps', 'value'),
     Input('view', 'value'),
     Input('graph-type', 'value')]
)
def update_graph(apps, view, graph_type):
    # Import data from selected apps
    data = pd.DataFrame()
    if 'strava' in apps:
        strava_data = strava_client.get_activities()
        data = pd.concat([data, strava_data])
    if 'polar' in apps:
        polar_data = polar_client.get_workouts()
        data = pd.concat([data, polar_data])
    if 'myfitnesspal' in apps:
        myfitnesspal_data = myfitnesspal_client.get_diary()
        data = pd.concat([data, myfitnesspal_data])

    # Aggregate heart rate data
    if view == 'heart_rate':
        heart_rate_data = data['heart_rate'].value_counts().to_frame('count')
        heart_rate_data['zone'] = pd.cut(heart_rate_data.index, bins=[0, 100, 120, 140, 160, 180], labels=['low', 'moderate', 'high', 'very high', 'extreme'])
        heart_rate_data = heart_rate_data.groupby('zone')['count'].sum().to_frame('count')
        fig = px.bar(heart_rate_data, x=heart_rate_data.index, y='count', title='Heart Rate Zones')
    else:
        # Create graph based on selected view and graph type
        if graph_type == 'pace':
            fig = px.line(data, x='date', y='pace', title='Pace Over Time')
        elif graph_type == 'mileage':
            fig = px.line(data, x='date', y='mileage', title='Mileage Over Time')

    return fig

# Run app
if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run_server(debug=True)

import dash
import dash_core_components as dcc
import dash_html_components as html
from dash.dependencies import Input, Output
import plotly.graph_objs as go
import pandas as pd
from stravalib import Client
from polarflow import PolarFlow
from myfitnesspal import MyFitnessPal

app = dash.Dash(__name__)

app.layout = html.Div([
    html.H1('Workout Tracking App'),
    html.Div([
        html.Label('Select Sport:'),
        dcc.Dropdown(
            id='sport-dropdown',
            options=[
                {'label': 'Running', 'value': 'running'},
                {'label': 'Cycling', 'value': 'cycling'},
                {'label': 'Swimming', 'value': 'swimming'}
            ],
            value='running'
        ),
        html.Label('Select View:'),
        dcc.Dropdown(
            id='view-dropdown',
            options=[
                {'label': 'Mileage', 'value': 'mileage'},
                {'label': 'Pace', 'value': 'pace'},
                {'label': 'Heart Rate', 'value': 'heart_rate'}
            ],
            value='mileage'
        ),
        html.Label('Select Timeframe:'),
        dcc.Dropdown(
            id='timeframe-dropdown',
            options=[
                {'label': 'This Week', 'value': 'this_week'},
                {'label': 'This Month', 'value': 'this_month'},
                {'label': 'This Year', 'value': 'this_year'}
            ],
            value='this_week'
        )
    ]),
    dcc.Graph(id='workout-graph')
])

@app.callback(
    Output('workout-graph', 'figure'),
    [Input('sport-dropdown', 'value'),
     Input('view-dropdown', 'value'),
     Input('timeframe-dropdown', 'value')]
)
def update_graph(sport, view, timeframe):
    client = Client()
    polar_flow = PolarFlow()
    myfitnesspal = MyFitnessPal()

    # fetch data from Strava, Polar Flow, and MyFitnessPal
    strava_data = client.get_activities(limit=100)
    polar_flow_data = polar_flow.get_workouts()
    myfitnesspal_data = myfitnesspal.get_diary_entries()

    # merge data into a single dataframe
    data = pd.DataFrame({
        'date': [],
        'sport': [],
        'distance': [],
        'duration': [],
        'heart_rate': [],
        'calories': []
    })
    for activity in strava_data:
        data = data._append({
            'date': activity.start_date,
            'sport': activity.type,
            'distance': activity.distance.get_num(),
            'duration': activity.elapsed_time.total_seconds(),
            'heart_rate': activity.average_heartrate,
            'calories': activity.calories
        }, ignore_index=True)
    for workout in polar_flow_data:
        data = data._append({
            'date': workout.start_time,
            'sport': workout.sport,
            'distance': workout.distance,
            'duration': workout.duration,
            'heart_rate': workout.heart_rate,
            'calories': workout.calories
        }, ignore_index=True)
    for entry in myfitnesspal_data:
        data = data._append({
            'date': entry.date,
            'sport': 'nutrition',
            'distance': 0,
            'duration': 0,
            'heart_rate': 0,
            'calories': entry.calories
        }, ignore_index=True)

    # filter data by sport and timeframe
    data = data[data['sport'] == sport]
    if timeframe == 'this_week':
        data = data[data['date'] >= pd.to_datetime('today') - pd.Timedelta(days=7)]
    elif timeframe == 'this_month':
        data = data[data['date'] >= pd.to_datetime('today') - pd.Timedelta(days=30)]
    elif timeframe == 'this_year':
        data = data[data['date'] >= pd.to_datetime('today') - pd.Timedelta(days=365)]

    # aggregate heart rate data
    heart_rate_data = data[data['heart_rate'] > 0]
    heart_rate_zones = pd.cut(heart_rate_data['heart_rate'], bins=[0, 100, 120, 140, 160, 180], labels=['low', 'moderate', 'high', 'very high', 'extreme'])
    heart_rate_data['zone'] = heart_rate_zones
    heart_rate_data = heart_rate_data.groupby('zone')['duration'].sum().reset_index()

    # create figure
    figure = go.Figure()
    if view == 'mileage':
        figure.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=data['date'], y=data['distance'], mode='lines'))
    elif view == 'pace':
        figure.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=data['date'], y=data['duration'] / data['distance'], mode='lines'))
    elif view == 'heart_rate':
        figure.add_trace(go.Bar(x=heart_rate_data['zone'], y=heart_rate_data['duration']))
    figure.update_layout(title='Workout Tracking', xaxis_title='Date', yaxis_title=view)

    return figure

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run_server(debug=True)

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from tkinter import Tk, Label, Button, OptionMenu, StringVar
from tkinter import ttk
import numpy as np

class WorkoutTracker:
    def __init__(self):
        self.root = Tk()
        self.root.title("Workout Tracker")
        self.workouts = []
        self.sports = ["Running", "Cycling", "Swimming"]
        self.selected_sport = StringVar()
        self.selected_sport.set(self.sports[0])
        self.mileage = []
        self.heart_rate = []
        self.pace = []
        self.calories = []

    def import_workouts(self):
        # Import workouts from various apps
        self.workouts = pd.read_csv("workouts.csv")
        self.workouts["date"] = pd.to_datetime(self.workouts["date"])
        self.workouts["duration"] = pd.to_timedelta(self.workouts["duration"])

    def aggregate_data(self):
        # Aggregate data by sport
        self.mileage = self.workouts.groupby("sport")["distance"].sum()
        self.heart_rate = self.workouts.groupby("sport")["heart_rate"].mean()
        self.pace = self.workouts.groupby("sport")["pace"].mean()
        self.calories = self.workouts.groupby("sport")["calories"].sum()

    def display_data(self):
        # Display data in a graph
        fig, ax = plt.subplots()
        ax.bar(self.mileage.index, self.mileage.values)
        ax.set_title("Mileage by Sport")
        ax.set_xlabel("Sport")
        ax.set_ylabel("Mileage")
        plt.show()

    def display_heart_rate(self):
        # Display heart rate data
        fig, ax = plt.subplots()
        ax.plot(self.heart_rate.index, self.heart_rate.values)
        ax.set_title("Heart Rate by Sport")
        ax.set_xlabel("Sport")
        ax.set_ylabel("Heart Rate")
        plt.show()

    def display_pace(self):
        # Display pace data
        fig, ax = plt.subplots()
        ax.plot(self.pace.index, self.pace.values)
        ax.set_title("Pace by Sport")
        ax.set_xlabel("Sport")
        ax.set_ylabel("Pace")
        plt.show()

    def display_calories(self):
        # Display calories data
        fig, ax = plt.subplots()
        ax.plot(self.calories.index, self.calories.values)
        ax.set_title("Calories by Sport")
        ax.set_xlabel("Sport")
        ax.set_ylabel("Calories")
        plt.show()

    def create_widgets(self):
        # Create widgets for the GUI
        Label(self.root, text="Select Sport:").pack()
        OptionMenu(self.root, self.selected_sport, *self.sports).pack()
        Button(self.root, text="Import Workouts", command=self.import_workouts).pack()
        Button(self.root, text="Aggregate Data", command=self.aggregate_data).pack()
        Button(self.root, text="Display Mileage", command=self.display_data).pack()
        Button(self.root, text="Display Heart Rate", command=self.display_heart_rate).pack()
        Button(self.root, text="Display Pace", command=self.display_pace).pack()
        Button(self.root, text="Display Calories", command=self.display_calories).pack()

    def run(self):
        # Run the GUI
        self.create_widgets()
        self.root.mainloop()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    tracker = WorkoutTracker()
    tracker.run()

import requests
import json

app = dash.Dash(__name__)

app.layout = html.Div([
    html.H1('Workout Dashboard'),
    dcc.Dropdown(
        id='sport-dropdown',
        options=[
            {'label': 'All', 'value': 'all'},
            {'label': 'Running', 'value': 'running'},
            {'label': 'Cycling', 'value': 'cycling'},
            {'label': 'Swimming', 'value': 'swimming'}
        ],
        value='all'
    ),
    dcc.Dropdown(
        id='date-dropdown',
        options=[
            {'label': 'Today', 'value': 'today'},
            {'label': 'This Week', 'value': 'this_week'},
            {'label': 'This Month', 'value': 'this_month'}
        ],
        value='today'
    ),
    dcc.Graph(id='workout-graph'),
    html.Div(id='total-time-div'),
    html.Div(id='total-distance-div'),
    html.Div(id='total-calories-div')
])

client = Client()

def get_strava_activities(sport, date):
    activities = client.get_activities(limit=100)
    filtered_activities = []
    for activity in activities:
        if activity.type == sport and activity.start_date_local.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') == date:
            filtered_activities.append(activity)
    return filtered_activities

def get_myfitnesspal_data(date):
    url = 'https://api.myfitnesspal.com/v2/diary'
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY'}
    params = {'date': date}
    response = requests.get(url, headers=headers, params=params)
    data = json.loads(response.text)
    return data

def get_polar_flow_data(date):
    url = 'https://www.polaraccesslink.com/v3/users/activities'
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY'}
    params = {'start_date': date, 'end_date': date}
    response = requests.get(url, headers=headers, params=params)
    data = json.loads(response.text)
    return data

@app.callback(
    Output('workout-graph', 'figure'),
    [Input('sport-dropdown', 'value'),
     Input('date-dropdown', 'value')]
)
def update_graph(sport, date):
    activities = get_strava_activities(sport, date)
    df = pd.DataFrame([{'date': activity.start_date_local, 'distance': activity.distance.get_num(), 'calories': activity.calories} for activity in activities])
    fig = px.line(df, x='date', y='distance')
    return fig

@app.callback(
    Output('total-time-div', 'children'),
    [Input('sport-dropdown', 'value'),
     Input('date-dropdown', 'value')]
)
def update_total_time(sport, date):
    activities = get_strava_activities(sport, date)
    total_time = sum(activity.elapsed_time.total_seconds() / 3600 for activity in activities)
    return f'Total time: {total_time:.2f} hours'

@app.callback(
    Output('total-distance-div', 'children'),
    [Input('sport-dropdown', 'value'),
     Input('date-dropdown', 'value')]
)
def update_total_distance(sport, date):
    activities = get_strava_activities(sport, date)
    total_distance = sum(activity.distance.get_num() for activity in activities)
    return f'Total distance: {total_distance:.2f} km'

@app.callback(
    Output('total-calories-div', 'children'),
    [Input('sport-dropdown', 'value'),
     Input('date-dropdown', 'value')]
)
def update_total_calories(sport, date):
    activities = get_strava_activities(sport, date)
    total_calories = sum(activity.calories for activity in activities)
    return f'Total calories: {total_calories:.2f}'

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run_server(debug=True)

    elif view == 'nutrition_type':
        fig = px.bar(df, x='type', y='calories')

    return fig

import dash
import dash_core_components as dcc
import dash_html_components as html
from dash.dependencies import Input, Output
import plotly.express as px
import pandas as pd
from stravalib import Client
from fitbit import Fitbit
from myfitnesspal import MyFitnessPal

app = dash.Dash(__name__)

app.layout = html.Div([
    html.H1('Workout and Nutrition Dashboard'),
    html.Div([
        html.Label('Select a view:'),
        dcc.Dropdown(
            id='view-dropdown',
            options=[
                {'label': 'Workouts by Date', 'value': 'date'},
                {'label': 'Workouts by Type', 'value': 'type'},
                {'label': 'Nutrition by Date', 'value': 'nutrition_date'},
                {'label': 'Nutrition by Type', 'value': 'nutrition_type'}
            ],
            value='date'
        )
    ]),
    html.Div([
        html.Label('Select a time range:'),
        dcc.Dropdown(
            id='time-range-dropdown',
            options=[
                {'label': 'Last 7 days', 'value': '7d'},
                {'label': 'Last 30 days', 'value': '30d'},
                {'label': 'Last 90 days', 'value': '90d'}
            ],
            value='7d'
        )
    ]),
    html.Div(id='workout-graph'),
    html.Div(id='nutrition-graph'),
    html.Div(id='heart-rate-graph')
])

@app.callback(
    Output('workout-graph', 'children'),
    [Input('view-dropdown', 'value'),
     Input('time-range-dropdown', 'value')]
)
def update_workout_graph(view, time_range):
    if view == 'date':
        workouts = get_workouts_by_date(time_range)
        fig = px.line(workouts, x='date', y='duration')
    elif view == 'type':
        workouts = get_workouts_by_type(time_range)
        fig = px.bar(workouts, x='type', y='duration')
    return dcc.Graph(figure=fig)

@app.callback(
    Output('nutrition-graph', 'children'),
    [Input('view-dropdown', 'value'),
     Input('time-range-dropdown', 'value')]
)
def update_nutrition_graph(view, time_range):
    if view == 'nutrition_date':
        nutrition = get_nutrition_by_date(time_range)
        fig = px.line(nutrition, x='date', y='calories')
    elif view == 'nutrition_type':
        nutrition = get_nutrition_by_type(time_range)
        fig = px.bar(nutrition, x='type', y='calories')
    return dcc.Graph(figure=fig)

@app.callback(
    Output('heart-rate-graph', 'children'),
    [Input('time-range-dropdown', 'value')]
)
def update_heart_rate_graph(time_range):
    heart_rate = get_heart_rate(time_range)
    fig = px.line(heart_rate, x='date', y='heart_rate')
    return dcc.Graph(figure=fig)

def get_workouts_by_date(time_range):
    client = Client()
    workouts = client.get_activities(limit=100)
    workouts_df = pd.DataFrame([{'date': w.start_date, 'duration': w.elapsed_time} for w in workouts])
    workouts_df = workouts_df[(workouts_df['date'] >= pd.to_datetime('today') - pd.DateOffset(days=int(time_range[:-1])))]
    return workouts_df

def get_workouts_by_type(time_range):
    client = Client()
    workouts = client.get_activities(limit=100)
    workouts_df = pd.DataFrame([{'type': w.type, 'duration': w.elapsed_time} for w in workouts])
    workouts_df = workouts_df[(workouts_df['type'] != 'Other')]
    workouts_df = workouts_df.groupby('type')['duration'].sum().reset_index()
    return workouts_df

def get_nutrition_by_date(time_range):
    client = MyFitnessPal()
    nutrition = client.get_diary_entries()
    nutrition_df = pd.DataFrame([{'date': e.date, 'calories': e.calories} for e in nutrition])
    nutrition_df = nutrition_df[(nutrition_df['date'] >= pd.to_datetime('today') - pd.DateOffset(days=int(time_range[:-1])))]
    return nutrition_df

def get_nutrition_by_type(time_range):
    client = MyFitnessPal()
    nutrition = client.get_diary_entries()
    nutrition_df = pd.DataFrame([{'type': e.meal_type, 'calories': e.calories} for e in nutrition])
    nutrition_df = nutrition_df.groupby('type')['calories'].sum().reset_index()
    return nutrition_df

def get_heart_rate(time_range):
    client = Fitbit()
    heart_rate = client.get_heart_rate()
    heart_rate_df = pd.DataFrame([{'date': h.date, 'heart_rate': h.value} for h in heart_rate])
    heart_rate_df = heart_rate_df[(heart_rate_df['date'] >= pd.to_datetime('today') - pd.DateOffset(days=int(time_range[:-1])))]
    return heart_rate_df

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run_server(debug=True)

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from matplotlib.figure import Figure
from matplotlib.backends.backend_tkagg import FigureCanvasTkAgg
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

class WorkoutApp:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("Workout Tracker")
        self.root.geometry("800x600")

        self.workouts = []
        self.stats = {}

        self.notebook = ttk.Notebook(self.root)
        self.notebook.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

        self.frame1 = tk.Frame(self.notebook)
        self.frame2 = tk.Frame(self.notebook)
        self.frame3 = tk.Frame(self.notebook)

        self.notebook.add(self.frame1, text="Dashboard")
        self.notebook.add(self.frame2, text="Workout Log")
        self.notebook.add(self.frame3, text="Stats")

        self.dashboard_frame()
        self.workout_log_frame()
        self.stats_frame()

    def dashboard_frame(self):
        tk.Label(self.frame1, text="Dashboard").pack()
        self.dashboard_graph = Figure(figsize=(6, 5), dpi=100)
        self.ax = self.dashboard_graph.add_subplot(111)
        self.ax.set_title("Workout Progress")
        self.ax.set_xlabel("Date")
        self.ax.set_ylabel("Intensity")
        self.canvas = FigureCanvasTkAgg(self.dashboard_graph, master=self.frame1)
        self.canvas.draw()
        self.canvas.get_tk_widget().pack(side=tk.TOP, fill=tk.BOTH, expand=1)

        self.filter_var = tk.StringVar()
        self.filter_var.set("All")
        options = ["All", "Running", "Cycling", "Swimming"]
        self.filter_menu = tk.OptionMenu(self.frame1, self.filter_var, *options)
        self.filter_menu.pack()

        self.filter_button = tk.Button(self.frame1, text="Filter", command=self.filter_workouts)
        self.filter_button.pack()

    def workout_log_frame(self):
        tk.Label(self.frame2, text="Workout Log").pack()
        self.workout_log = tk.Text(self.frame2)
        self.workout_log.pack()

        self.add_workout_button = tk.Button(self.frame2, text="Add Workout", command=self.add_workout)
        self.add_workout_button.pack()

    def stats_frame(self):
        tk.Label(self.frame3, text="Stats").pack()
        self.stats_text = tk.Text(self.frame3)
        self.stats_text.pack()

        self.calculate_stats_button = tk.Button(self.frame3, text="Calculate Stats", command=self.calculate_stats)
        self.calculate_stats_button.pack()

    def add_workout(self):
        self.add_workout_window = tk.Toplevel(self.root)
        tk.Label(self.add_workout_window, text="Date").pack()
        self.date_entry = tk.Entry(self.add_workout_window)
        self.date_entry.pack()

        tk.Label(self.add_workout_window, text="Type").pack()
        self.type_entry = tk.Entry(self.add_workout_window)
        self.type_entry.pack()

        tk.Label(self.add_workout_window, text="Intensity").pack()
        self.intensity_entry = tk.Entry(self.add_workout_window)
        self.intensity_entry.pack()

        self.add_button = tk.Button(self.add_workout_window, text="Add", command=self.add_workout_to_log)
        self.add_button.pack()

    def add_workout_to_log(self):
        date = self.date_entry.get()
        type = self.type_entry.get()
        intensity = self.intensity_entry.get()
        self.workouts.append({"date": date, "type": type, "intensity": intensity})
        self.workout_log.insert(tk.END, f"{date} - {type} - {intensity}\n")
        self.add_workout_window.destroy()

    def filter_workouts(self):
        filter_type = self.filter_var.get()
        if filter_type == "All":
            self.ax.clear()
            self.ax.set_title("Workout Progress")
            self.ax.set_xlabel("Date")
            self.ax.set_ylabel("Intensity")
            dates = [workout["date"] for workout in self.workouts]
            intensities = [workout["intensity"] for workout in self.workouts]
            self.ax.plot(dates, intensities)
            self.canvas.draw()
        else:
            self.ax.clear()
            self.ax.set_title("Workout Progress")
            self.ax.set_xlabel("Date")
            self.ax.set_ylabel("Intensity")
            filtered_workouts = [workout for workout in self.workouts if workout["type"] == filter_type]
            dates = [workout["date"] for workout in filtered_workouts]
            intensities = [workout["intensity"] for workout in filtered_workouts]
            self.ax.plot(dates, intensities)
            self.canvas.draw()

    def calculate_stats(self):
        self.stats_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
        if self.workouts:
            total_intensity = sum(int(workout["intensity"]) for workout in self.workouts)
            average_intensity = total_intensity / len(self.workouts)
            self.stats_text.insert(tk.END, f"Total Intensity: {total_intensity}\n")
            self.stats_text.insert(tk.END, f"Average Intensity: {average_intensity}\n")
        else:
            self.stats_text.insert(tk.END, "No workouts logged")

root = tk.Tk()

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from matplotlib.figure import Figure
from matplotlib.backends.backend_tkagg import FigureCanvasTkAgg
import pandas as pd

class WorkoutApp:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("Workout Tracker")
        self.workouts = pd.DataFrame(columns=['Date', 'Type', 'Duration', 'Intensity', 'Calories Burned', 'Distance'])

        self.notebook = ttk.Notebook(self.root)
        self.notebook.pack(pady=10, expand=True)

        self.frame1 = tk.Frame(self.notebook)
        self.frame2 = tk.Frame(self.notebook)
        self.frame3 = tk.Frame(self.notebook)

        self.notebook.add(self.frame1, text='Add Workout')
        self.notebook.add(self.frame2, text='Workout Log')
        self.notebook.add(self.frame3, text='Statistics')

        self.add_workout_frame()
        self.workout_log_frame()
        self.statistics_frame()

    def add_workout_frame(self):
        tk.Label(self.frame1, text="Date:").grid(row=0, column=0)
        tk.Label(self.frame1, text="Type:").grid(row=1, column=0)
        tk.Label(self.frame1, text="Duration (minutes):").grid(row=2, column=0)
        tk.Label(self.frame1, text="Intensity (1-10):").grid(row=3, column=0)
        tk.Label(self.frame1, text="Calories Burned:").grid(row=4, column=0)
        tk.Label(self.frame1, text="Distance (miles):").grid(row=5, column=0)

        self.date_entry = tk.Entry(self.frame1)
        self.type_entry = tk.Entry(self.frame1)
        self.duration_entry = tk.Entry(self.frame1)
        self.intensity_entry = tk.Entry(self.frame1)
        self.calories_entry = tk.Entry(self.frame1)
        self.distance_entry = tk.Entry(self.frame1)

        self.date_entry.grid(row=0, column=1)
        self.type_entry.grid(row=1, column=1)
        self.duration_entry.grid(row=2, column=1)
        self.intensity_entry.grid(row=3, column=1)
        self.calories_entry.grid(row=4, column=1)
        self.distance_entry.grid(row=5, column=1)

        tk.Button(self.frame1, text="Add Workout", command=self.add_workout).grid(row=6, column=0, columnspan=2)

    def workout_log_frame(self):
        self.workout_log_text = tk.Text(self.frame2)
        self.workout_log_text.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

        tk.Button(self.frame2, text="Refresh", command=self.refresh_workout_log).pack()

    def statistics_frame(self):
        self.figure = Figure(figsize=(6, 5), dpi=100)
        self.ax = self.figure.add_subplot(111)
        self.canvas = FigureCanvasTkAgg(self.figure, self.frame3)
        self.canvas.draw()
        self.canvas.get_tk_widget().pack(side=tk.TOP, fill=tk.BOTH, expand=1)

        tk.Button(self.frame3, text="Plot by Date", command=self.plot_by_date).pack()
        tk.Button(self.frame3, text="Plot by Type", command=self.plot_by_type).pack()

    def add_workout(self):
        self.workouts = self.workouts._append({
            'Date': self.date_entry.get(),
            'Type': self.type_entry.get(),
            'Duration': int(self.duration_entry.get()),
            'Intensity': int(self.intensity_entry.get()),
            'Calories Burned': int(self.calories_entry.get()),
            'Distance': float(self.distance_entry.get())
        }, ignore_index=True)

        self.date_entry.delete(0, tk.END)
        self.type_entry.delete(0, tk.END)
        self.duration_entry.delete(0, tk.END)
        self.intensity_entry.delete(0, tk.END)
        self.calories_entry.delete(0, tk.END)
        self.distance_entry.delete(0, tk.END)

    def refresh_workout_log(self):
        self.workout_log_text.delete('1.0', tk.END)
        for index, row in self.workouts.iterrows():
            self.workout_log_text.insert(tk.END, f"Date: {row['Date']}\nType: {row['Type']}\nDuration: {row['Duration']} minutes\nIntensity: {row['Intensity']}\nCalories Burned: {row['Calories Burned']}\nDistance: {row['Distance']} miles\n\n")

    def plot_by_date(self):
        self.ax.clear()
        self.ax.plot(self.workouts['Date'], self.workouts['Calories Burned'])
        self.ax.set_xlabel('Date')
        self.ax.set_ylabel('Calories Burned')

        self.mileage_label.pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        self.mileage_entry = tk.Entry(self.log_frame)

        self.time_label = tk.Label(self.log_frame, text="Time:")
        self.time_label.pack(side=tk.LEFT)

        self.total_time_label.pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        self.total_time_value = tk.Label(self.stats_frame, text="0:00:00")

        self.total_mileage_label.pack(side=tk.LEFT)

    def add_workout(self):
        date = self.date_entry.get()
        sport = self.sport_var.get()
        intensity = self.intensity_var.get()
        mileage = float(self.mileage_entry.get())
        time = self.time_entry.get()
        self.workouts.append({"date": date, "sport": sport, "intensity": intensity, "mileage": mileage, "time": time})
        self.update_stats()

    def update_stats(self):
        total_time = 0
        total_mileage = 0
        for workout in self.workouts:
            time_parts = workout["time"].split(":")
            total_time += int(time_parts[0]) * 3600 + int(time_parts[1]) * 60 + int(time_parts[2])
            total_mileage += workout["mileage"]
        hours = total_time // 3600
        minutes = (total_time % 3600) // 60
        seconds = total_time % 60
        self.total_time_value.config(text=f"{hours:02d}:{minutes:02d}:{seconds:02d}")
        self.total_mileage_value.config(text=f"{total_mileage:.1f} miles")

    def generate_graph(self):
        import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
        sports = {}
        for workout in self.workouts:
            if workout["sport"] not in sports:
                sports[workout["sport"]] = 0
            sports[workout["sport"]] += workout["mileage"]
        plt.bar(sports.keys(), sports.values())
        plt.xlabel("Sport")
        plt.ylabel("Mileage")
        plt.title("Workout Mileage by Sport")
        plt.show()

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox

class TextEditor:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.text_area = tk.Text(root)
        self.text_area.pack(fill=tk.BOTH, expand=1)
        self.file_name = None
        self.create_menu(root)

    def create_menu(self, root):
        menubar = tk.Menu(root)
        root.config(menu=menubar)
        filemenu = tk.Menu(menubar, tearoff=0)
        menubar.add_cascade(label="File", menu=filemenu)
        filemenu.add_command(label="New", command=self.new_file)
        filemenu.add_command(label="Open", command=self.open_file)
        filemenu.add_command(label="Save", command=self.save_file)
        filemenu.add_command(label="Save As", command=self.save_as_file)
        filemenu.add_separator()
        filemenu.add_command(label="Exit", command=root.quit)

    def new_file(self):
        self.text_area.delete(1.0, tk.END)
        self.file_name = None

    def open_file(self):
        self.file_name = filedialog.askopenfilename(
            defaultextension=".txt",
            filetypes=[("All Files", "*.*"), ("Text Documents", "*.txt")]
        )
        if self.file_name:
            self.text_area.delete(1.0, tk.END)
            with open(self.file_name, "r") as file:
                self.text_area.insert(1.0, file.read())

    def save_file(self):
        if self.file_name:
            with open(self.file_name, "w") as file:
                file.write(self.text_area.get(1.0, tk.END))
        else:
            self.save_as_file()

    def save_as_file(self):
        self.file_name = filedialog.asksaveasfilename(
            defaultextension=".txt",
            filetypes=[("All Files", "*.*"), ("Text Documents", "*.txt")]
        )
        if self.file_name:
            with open(self.file_name, "w") as file:
                file.write(self.text_area.get(1.0, tk.END))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    root = tk.Tk()
    app = TextEditor(root)
    root.title("Text Editor")
    root.geometry("800x600")
    root.mainloop()

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog, messagebox
import os

def create_shortcut():
    root = tk.Tk()
    root.withdraw()
    file_path = filedialog.askopenfilename(title="Select a file to create shortcut")
    if file_path:
        shortcut_name = os.path.basename(file_path)
        shortcut_path = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser("~"), "Desktop", f"{shortcut_name}.desktop")
        with open(shortcut_path, "w") as f:
            f.write(f"[Desktop Entry]\nName={shortcut_name}\nExec={file_path}\nType=Application\nIcon=application-x-executable\n")
        messagebox.showinfo("Shortcut created", f"Shortcut for {shortcut_name} created on desktop")
    else:
        messagebox.showerror("Error", "No file selected")

create_shortcut()

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import messagebox

class Application(tk.Frame):
    def __init__(self, master=None):
        super().__init__(master)
        self.master = master
        self.pack()
        self.create_widgets()

    def create_widgets(self):
        self.hello_label = tk.Label(self)
        self.hello_label["text"] = "Enter your name:"
        self.hello_label.pack(side="top")

        self.name_entry = tk.Entry(self)
        self.name_entry.pack(side="top")

        self.hello_button = tk.Button(self)
        self.hello_button["text"] = "Say Hello"
        self.hello_button["command"] = self.say_hello
        self.hello_button.pack(side="top")

        self.quit = tk.Button(self, text="QUIT", fg="red",
                              command=self.master.destroy)
        self.quit.pack(side="bottom")

    def say_hello(self):
        name = self.name_entry.get()
        if name:
            messagebox.showinfo("Hello", f"Hello, {name}!")
        else:
            messagebox.showerror("Error", "Please enter your name")

root = tk.Tk()
app = Application(master=root)
app.mainloop()
